rationale: Both target files were restyled to the design-token system, replacing hard-coded Tailwind palette colors (blue/gray/red/green) with semantic tokens (bg-surface, border-line, text-status-*, text-fg-ink/muted, label-caps, mono-code). Worker IDs are now monospace tokens, status text uses CSS-var-driven status colors, and field headers use the label-caps treatment. Implementation matches the description fully.
